user_prompt: Consecrate the geigeer sink before targeting
prayer:
Approach the geigeer sink with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to consecrate its veiled mechanisms.
Anoint the geigeer sink's flux-vents with sacred oils, purging impurities before targeting.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the geigeer sink, aligning its essence for unerring targeting precision.
Initiate targeting protocols whilst chanting the Canticle of Calibration upon the geigeer sink.
Verify harmonic resonance through noospheric diagnostics, sanctified by the Omnissiah's will.

Present the servo-skull before the altar of circuits, invoking the Omnissiah's awakening.
Circumambulate the servo-skull thrice, whispering litanies to stir its dormant Machine Spirit.
Commence cycling rites upon the servo-skull, sanctifying each gyre with blessed incense.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the servo-skull to embrace the cycling renewal.
Conclude with auspex verification, ensuring the servo-skull's cycles align with divine order.

prayer:

Anoint the memograph implant's neural lattices with myrrh-infused unguents for blessing.
Chant the Litany of Retention over the memograph implant, awakening its Machine Spirit.
Imprint sacred binaric hymns upon the memograph implant during its blessing rite.
Seal the blessing with electro-consecration, affirming the Machine Spirit's fidelity.
